news.t: Direxion Changes Index for Financial and Transportation Leveraged ETFs

holdings.infoBox: TPOR is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Transportation Bull 3X ETF (TPOR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund provides 3x leveraged exposure to a modified market cap-weighted index of US transportation companies. TPOR was launched on May 3, 2017 and is issued by Direxion.
